rawAssistant: Hollowfen... a place where the heart can be as unforgiving as the land. Our town is built on the edge of a great unknown, where the winds howl and the earth trembles. We've learned to respect its power, not just with our words, but with every step we take. I've watched many come through these gates, seeking answers, seeking shelter. Some find what they're looking for; others... well, they don't. But that's the way of Hollowfen – a place where resilience is tested and the bonds between us are forged in the fire of uncertainty.
